title: Lint on Write
description: Run linter automatically after any file write or edit to catch issues immediately.

action.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then npx eslint --ext .ts,.tsx,.js,.jsx --max-warnings 0 $(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | tr '\n' ' ') 2>&1 | tail -20; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then ruff check $(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.py$' | tr '\n' ' ') 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
